narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 4-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 751 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
